name: com.ezg.tmp-essentials
description: Unity TextMesh Pro essential resources packaged for reuse — default Liberation Sans SDF font asset and materials, TMP Settings, the full SDF/Bitmap shader set (including URP and HDRP shader graphs), the EmojiOne sprite asset, and the default style sheet. Install this once from the shared registry instead of re-importing TMP Essential Resources into every project. Requires com.unity.ugui (which provides the TextMeshPro runtime in Unity 6).
